comment: 35yo male, newly-diagnosed HIV (positive serology, CD4 380, VL 45000), no current AIDS-defining malignancy. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = Biktarvy single-tablet ART + cancer screening cadence (anal cytology q1-3y, oral KS visual screening); alternative = ART decline (clinically aberrant, included for §15.2 C4). Validates v0.2-A HIV → DLBCL / KS / anal / cervical prevention pathway. Reimbursed via НСЗУ.
